text.title: SSL/TLS Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is TLS terminated by a managed platform (Heroku, Vercel, Netlify)?

branch.question: Is the domain proxied through Cloudflare?

text.example: api.faion.net behind Cloudflare → issue origin cert with API, install to /etc/nginx/ssl, mode=Full(strict).
